testCase.name: AppRouter should AppRouter was created
AppRouter should prop path /login is in Route
AppRouter should prop component is in Route and equal LoginRoute
AppRouter should prop path / is in Route
AppRouter should prop component is in Route and equal MainRoute
AppRouter should check if handlleRouteChange has been called
App should render an AppRouter
LoginFormView test unit should exists component
LoginFormView test unit should have placeHolder of email with string user @ ab-inb ...
LoginFormView test unit should be a button with type submit
LoginFormView test unit should have title B2B Admin Portal
LoginFormView test unit should have subTitle Enter Your E-mail
LoginFormView test unit should simulate click in button enter when input is empty and show message Required
LoginFormView test unit should simulate click in button enter when input have 123 and show message Invalid email
LoginFormView test unit should simulate click in button enter when input have domain email diferente of ABI and show message This email cant be used to log in
LoginFormView test unit should simulate click in button enter when input have domain email equals of ABI Email valid
LoginFormView test unit should simulate onBlur in input when input is empty and show message Required
LoginFormView test unit should simulate onBlur in input when input is 123 and show message Invalid email
Loginroute should Login Route was created
Loginroute should Login Form is inside Login Route
Loginroute should check all the props of Row
Loginroute should check all the props of Col
AuthService login should pass email and return router /login?email=email
AuthService isAuthenticated should check localStorage and return false and check called of localStorage.getItem
AuthService isAuthenticated should check local Storage, insert in local storage value valid and return true and check called of localStorage.getItem
LoginForm should LoginForm be instantiated correctly
LoginForm should set the onSubmit prop correctly
LoginForm should onSubmit do nothing when it was called
LoginForm isEmailValid was defined
LoginForm should validate that teste@gmail.com is an invalid email
LoginForm should validate that teste@yahoo.com is an invalid email
LoginForm should validate that teste@email.com is an invalid email
LoginForm should validate that @anheuser-busch.com is a valid domain
LoginForm should validate that @ab-inbev.com is a valid domain
LoginForm should validate that @cnd.com.do is a valid domain
LoginForm should validate that @fuzzproductions.com is a valid domain
LoginForm should validate that @gmodelo.com.mx is a valid domain
LoginForm should validate called onSubmit once
Palindrome Test should word noon is palindrome
Palindrome Test should word box is palindrome
Palindrome Test should word neon is palindrome
AppHistory should check the callback history is redirect to main page
AppHistory should check the callback history is redirect to login
AppHistory should check the callback history is redirect to main page when pathName is /login and is Auth
AppHistory should check the callback history is redirect to any page
Navigation should check called of history.push
MainRouter should Main Route was created
MainRouter should prop path is in Route
